message:
refactor(ops): replace panic! with unreachable! in telemetry bridge mutex lock error handlers

Continues the project-wide idiom migration: test-only mutex lock
unwrap_or_else closures now use unreachable!("state lock poisoned")
instead of panic!("state lock poisoned"), since a poisoned mutex in
these single-threaded test contexts indicates a logic error that should
never occur.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
